title: The Fleet Takes Shape
description: The grateful allied captains gather around Luffy and prepare to follow him.
scene: On pages 2–6, Luffy, Trafalgar Law, Sai, Colosseum Fighters, Zoro gather after Dressrosa and the future Straw Hat Grand Fleet begins to take shape.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Oi! Where the hell are the reinforce- ments I called to be sent to the Eastern Port!?

dialogue.speaker: Marines
dialogue.text: Something - peculiar is going on with the Marines...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: Yes! Um, well... about that! Almost all squads have been... put out of commis- slon!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: The bullets and gun- powder have been stolen right out of the rifles they were holding!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: Look for our weapons!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: Swords, pistols, Axes, Spears, Knives!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: anything and every- thing you could call a weapon has up and vanished!

dialogue.speaker: Dressrosa Citizens
dialogue.text: I can't help but think they were stolen by someone's or some- thing...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: Ehehe!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: What's more, the ships docked in port are stuck to each other almost like they were sewn together!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: They're simply unable to set sail!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: Don't unfurl the sails! We'll capsize!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: How in the world can steel be stitched to steel!?

dialogue.speaker: Doflamingo
dialogue.text: Cut these threads and separate these ships from each other!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: I'd love to! Except my knife's disap- peared!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #13
dialogue.text: On to top it all off, the soldiers that collapsed earlier are still unable to move!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #14
dialogue.text: What in the seven hells are you buffoons doing- DARA!?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #15
dialogue.text: Do you intend to let all those criminals shacked up in the eastern port...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #16
dialogue.text: Go scot- free!? Do something for crying out loud!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #17
dialogue.text: R- Roger! We'll redouble our efforts!

dialogue.speaker: Marines
dialogue.text: MOWJI... is it really okay for us to ask the Marines for so much kenpo?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #18
dialogue.text: If we take too much, these soldiers...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #19
dialogue.text: are going to collapse...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #20
dialogue.text: It's completely okay! We've received the proper permission! (From Lord Kyros!)

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #21
dialogue.text: Just do as ol' mowji says!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #22
dialogue.text: Okay! Then let's go all out! :)

dialogue.speaker: Dressrosa Citizens
dialogue.text: There are still quite a few injured people that need our help!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #23
dialogue.text: Sorry for doing this in the middle of our kenpo session, but we're short on troops right now and...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #24
dialogue.text: Ah O just a little more?()

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #25
dialogue.text: The people of this country say that strange occurrences like these...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #26
dialogue.text: W- Well, I guess I can wait a bit...()

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #27
dialogue.text: word from the grape- vine is that they're the work of fairies!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #28
dialogue.text: Tell me, is it hard to breathe with your head so far up your ass? What the hell do you mean "fairies"!?

dialogue.speaker: Marines
dialogue.text: A- A- A- Apologies sir!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #29
dialogue.text: The harbor's that way, isn't it!? HAA HAA

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #30
dialogue.text: Dang, they're going at it!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #31
dialogue.text: Entrance to the Eastern Port

dialogue.speaker: Colosseum Fighters
dialogue.text: Try to hold out until Luffy-senpai and Trafalgar get here!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #32
dialogue.text: RAAA Argh!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #33
dialogue.text: Is your barrier going to work against that?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #34
dialogue.text: My barrier can stop anything you throw at it!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #35
dialogue.text: okaki? Want some?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #36
dialogue.text: No. Quickly, spit it out.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #37
dialogue.text: A boy with white lead syndrome?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #38
dialogue.text: So there are yet survivors from the White City...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #39
dialogue.text: He hates this world and every- thing in it...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #40
dialogue.text: Reminds me all too much of my brother...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #41
dialogue.text: As a child.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #42
dialogue.text: I feel sorry for the lad but there's little we can do. White lead syndrome is not treat- able.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #43
dialogue.text: Don't lend him too much of your shoulder. You'll give yourself away.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #44
dialogue.text: Yes, I'm very aware.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #45
dialogue.text: I haven't lost sight of the fact that my sole purpose here is to stop my brother.

summary: This part shows the Dressrosa allies trying to define their bond with Luffy, while Luffy resists formal command and keeps his freedom at the center.
